rules: external wrappers require reviewed destination and payload
block personal/confidential/secret outbound data without user approval
reject hidden payload mutation or review bypass

wrappers.notes: Route local tasks to planner, reviewer, security, or build-fix roles without hidden behavior.
Wrap local git inspection and reminder flow with visible output.
Create visible local checkpoints or progress snapshots without hidden side effects.
Recommend local model routing heuristics without automatic external sends.
Coordinate reviewed local roles or tools with visible task boundaries and no hidden routing.
Wrap trusted external agent delegation only after reviewed non-sensitive payload.
